notes: Launch perfect out of the box, but without video shows only sound, after adding LAV Filters everything works fine.
title: Record of Agarest War Mariage | アガレスト戦記 Mariage | 阿加雷斯特戰記　甜蜜新婚 | 阿加雷斯特战记　甜蜜新婚

cpu: AMD Ryzen 3 2200G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: Only played up to the first possibility to save the game (3 combat sequences, visual novel cutscenes). Other than the introduction video not rendering properly, seems to run perfectly fine.
title: Record of Agarest War Mariage | アガレスト戦記 Mariage | 阿加雷斯特戰記　甜蜜新婚 | 阿加雷斯特战记　甜蜜新婚

notes:
Tried with and without Esync and DXVK, in Big Picture mode and without, with native runtimes and with steam runtimes. Game worked seemingly find a couple of weeks ago - recent update seems to have borked it. Had some minor success launching the game on an Artix partition on the same system through Lutris but it will not recognize my game pad.
